MARKET_CONTEXT_FULL: Alibaba experienced a powerful rally in early 2026, surging from sub-$100 levels to $192.67 on the strength of its AI and cloud computing initiatives. The company's Qwen AI models became the world's most-used open-source AI (600M+ downloads), while cloud revenue grew 34% YoY. Following this parabolic move, BABA has corrected 37% to $122.05, creating a new consolidation range. With 37 of 42 analysts maintaining Buy ratings and an average price target of $189 (55% upside), the market sees this pullback as a healthy digestion phase rather than fundamental deterioration.

ANALYST_CONSENSUS_SUMMARY: Strong Buy consensus with 37 of 42 analysts recommending purchase. Average price target of $189 implies 55% upside, supporting a floor under current levels and favoring range-bound trading.
GAMMA_WALL_EXPLANATION: Market maker gamma positioning creates mechanical support and resistance levels. Put Wall at $110: Large put open interest forces dealers to buy BABA as price approaches, creating support. Call Wall at $135: Significant call open interest forces dealers to sell as price rallies, creating resistance.
GAMMA_WALL_TRADE_ALIGNMENT: Our short strikes ($115 put, $130 call) are positioned well inside the gamma walls, creating a comfortable buffer. Long strikes ($110 put, $135 call) align precisely with the gamma walls for maximum structural protection from dealer hedging flows.
